404.description: Oops! The page you are looking for seems to have wandered off.
404.title: Page Not Found

aiCuration.description: Our advanced algorithms analyze and categorize content automatically, ensuring you find exactly what you're looking for without the noise.
aiCuration.title: AI-Powered Curation

mobileFirst.description: Experience seamless viewing on any device. Install as a PWA for a native app-like experience on your phone or tablet.
mobileFirst.title: Mobile First

smartDiscovery.description: Intelligent search and recommendation engines help you uncover hidden gems and trending videos tailored to your interests.
smartDiscovery.title: Smart Discovery

about.heroDescription: Your intelligent hub for curated video content. Powered by AI to bring you the best of the web, organized and personalized.

mission.p1: We believe that finding great content shouldn't be a chore. In an ocean of infinite uploads, nisam.video acts as your lighthouse, guiding you to quality videos that matter.
mission.p2: By leveraging cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence (GPT-5) and modern web technologies, we're building the future of video aggregation—privacy-focused, ad-free, and community-driven.
mission.title: Our Mission

donate.benefit1: Keep the platform accessible and free for everyone
donate.benefit2: Continuously improve AI algorithms for better categorization
donate.benefit3: Add new channels and expand our video library
donate.benefit5: Develop new features you want to see
donate.community: Together, we're building a better platform for all
donate.description: nisam.video is a free platform dedicated to providing quality video content organized with AI technology. Your donation helps us:
donate.hero: Help us continue providing quality content
donate.impact: Your contribution, no matter the size, makes a real difference
donate.impactText: Every donation, large or small, directly contributes to maintaining and improving the nisam.video platform. Your support enables us to continue our mission of providing free access to quality video content for the entire community.
donate.title: Support nisam.video
